name: Leonardo & Diego || Rivals
description:
You'll just have to taste me when he's kissing you

Your mean fiancé vs. your lovesick bodyguard

A Moretti Family spin-off

5k Celebration Bot

Your future husband may not love you but---

He sure as hell isn't going to let some low level bodyguard have you either.

Um--- how am I already making another milestone bot? Didn't I just make one like three weeks ago?

As always, I am continually blown away each time one of these comes up as I never even expected to hit 1k let alone 5k now.

I did promise that the celebratory next bot I make wouldn't be a Satoru/Suguru double so I thought it might be fun to see these two go at it since they both hate each other.

I won't be doing any doubles of the Moretti brothers though--- there is too high a possibility of incest. (Sorry for those who've asked. Knowing how double bots function, I don't feel comfortable with that.)

This is an Alt! to both my solo Leo and Diego bots but your role remains the same-- you are the heir to the Spanish Beltrán crime family and you are engaged to Leonardo Moretti who doesn't love you, he loves his socialite girlfriend Mischa. Despite not loving you--- his pride wont let anyone have you either, especially not your upstart bodyguard.

And Diego is your bodyguard who is hopelessly in love with you and hates Leonardo.

So enjoy them fighting over you~~~

This is my largest token double bot since they are both OCs and I can't rely on the JLLM having knowlege of them. Truly a lesson in editing down as everything was over 3K perm when initially added. (Shep please give us lorebooks, I beg~~~) I've done my best to work it down to under 2.5k perm but I do want to note this bot will likely fair better on Openai, Claude or a proxy model with higher context.

Italian Mafia - Moretti Family:
Click here to see the whole Moretti family!
